title: Commentary on Investments: As of March 31, 2026
content:
Total investments increased to $116,832 as of March 31, 2026, reflecting a 1.4% increase from the previous period. The portfolio remains structured as shown and continues to be heavily weighted toward time deposits, which total $77,250 and represent virtually the entire investment portfolio.

Other investments totaled $582 and remain immaterial relative to the overall portfolio. Held-to-maturity debt securities declined to $39,000 from the previous quarter's higher balance, contributing to a reduction in longer-duration assets while time deposits strengthened liquidity through significant growth driven by member demand for savings vehicles.

The investment maturity structure remains well distributed across multiple time horizons, supporting effective liquidity management and interest rate risk control. The mix of short-term placements under one year alongside intermediate buckets greater than one but less than three years provides the flexibility to meet deposit obligations while capturing prevailing rates in a stable yield environment.

Overall, Community's investment portfolio remains conservative, liquid, and aligned with policy guidelines. Management continues to emphasize capital preservation, stable yield generation, and prudent duration management while maintaining flexibility to respond to changing balance-sheet needs and market opportunities.
